notes: New Announcements hub tracks verified gaming showcases, conventions, awards, esports, trailers, and season reveals
Exact event times are shown in each device's local timezone; date-only events stay clearly marked Time TBA
Distinct source emblems and checkbox filters make events and official videos easy to scan
Official YouTube playback now works directly in Announcements, including Marvel Rivals Season 9
The last successful schedule remains available if the service is offline
Android and iOS keep all existing on-device library data during the update
